Verdict

Q-DEMO-COMMITTEE

frozen 2026-07-22 · challenge model · run Q-DEMO-COMMITTEE-mc300-s42-ee2ecaf05921

Live-searched inputs. Formalized with web search on, so the inputs reflect the web as of the freeze date — not a clean historical backtest.

Most likely: No new action; left to the diplomatic track — 37% of 300 simulated draws. The forecast median is 61 on the 0-100 scale, in the band “No new action; left to the diplomatic track” (50–74).

These shares reflect uncertainty in the stated input ranges only. They exclude model error, coding error, and events outside the modelled game.

Segment width tracks each band's span; fill darkness is its share of the draws; the outlined band is the most likely. Beneath: ▲ median, bracket = 80% CI.

What would change this: Subject state's position — moving it across its stated range swings the forecast by +37.5 points (35 to 72).

Reading

The scale runs 0 to 100. 0 means maximal pressure — a censure resolution referring the matter upward. 100 means maximal accommodation — the board closes the file. The forecast sits at 61 — around the midpoint.

The players and where they stand:

  • Pressure bloc sits near the low end; the outcome is a defining issue for it.
  • Two members sit around the midpoint: Aligned moderates and Non-aligned swing bloc — a live concern for each.
  • Accommodation bloc sits near the high end; the outcome is a live concern for it.
  • Subject state sits near the high end; the outcome is a defining issue for it.

Circle area ∝ capability×salience. Amber = the low half (toward 0); teal = the high half (toward 100). Dashed ring + * = non-voting / out-of-body influence.

The settlement is a capability×salience weighted average of these positions. The heaviest weights sit with Pressure bloc (38% of the weight) and Aligned moderates (19% of the weight), pulling the result near the low end. The closed-form weighted mean lands at 45.

Genuinely uncertain: Non-aligned swing bloc's position (anywhere from 30 to 74); Non-aligned swing bloc's salience (anywhere from 20 to 55); Accommodation bloc's position (anywhere from 58 to 88).

this run (challenge)61.4No new action; left to the diplomatic track

The two solvers differ by 16.7 points and land in different bands. Their outputs are shown side by side, never blended into one number.

What rests on sources vs inference

Sourced — traces to fetched sources or supplied text:

  • Pressure bloc — 1 evidence note(s)
  • Aligned moderates — 1 evidence note(s)

Inferred — asserted where the sources were silent:

  • The swing bloc is treated as a single actor.
    Sources report its members voting together but do not define it as a formal bloc.
  • Board composition is unchanged from the prior session.
    No source confirms the roster seated for this meeting.

What to watch — sensitivity

schelling solve <game>.json --seed 42 --solver challenge --draws 300
